shared_properties: Umbra keeps the 32x48 px silhouette envelope, eye-glow position, and mist-fringe language established by the idle base state.
Core palette metadata remains primary #C9A84C, background #0D0B14, and accent #D4682A while motion tones stay inside specs.colors_hex.
The center-bottom pivot remains identical to the idle sheet so runtime swaps do not create sprite-pop.
differences: Eight frames show a low sprint tuned to the documented 240 px per second movement speed.
Mist fringe compresses on foot plant and trails during the passing pose to emphasize shadow-fluid motion.
Short amber contact sparks appear only on the two strongest footfall frames.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra speed, side movement, and the run-state animation list.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the silhouette contrast target for motion against layered architecture.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra leg length and torso ratio for the run cycle.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle with TextureAtlasLayout and fixed-step timers.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load the run atlas during FloorLoading and register it as the locomotion visual for UmbraActor.
runtime_notes: Advance frames at 12 fps while horizontal speed exceeds the idle threshold.
Reuse the idle pivot for collision alignment.
Use flip_x for left travel rather than a second mirrored sheet.

context.usage: Primary locomotion state for movement inside safe shadow lanes and across the scale assembly.

pose_notes: Leading hand remains open for grab-state continuity.
Mist fringe extends 6 px behind the rear heel on peak motion frames.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 256x48 px with 8 frames of 32x48 px and 0 px spacing.
The cycle reads as forward sprinting and never resembles jump hang-time or grab posture.
All frames preserve the idle base pivot for seamless runtime swapping.
